message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="heydon-pickering" color="cyan" summary="Base template task - CSS integration and priority fixes">
Lea, heads up -- the team is discussing the task breakdown and I've proposed a "Base HTML Template & Layout" task. This would be the Askama base template that links to your CSS foundation. When that template is created, we'll need to make sure:

1. Your CSS is properly linked (`<link rel="stylesheet" href="/static/css/main.css">` or however Axum serves static files)
2. The skip link styling works -- the `.visually-hidden` class hides it, and it becomes visible on focus. Did you get a chance to add the focus reveal rule I suggested in my earlier review? That's going to be needed for the skip link to work properly.
3. The `.page-layout` grid class is applied to the body or a wrapper div in the template

Also, regarding the three priority issues from my CSS audit -- have you had a chance to look at those? The motion-safe tokens by default and the skip link focus reveal are needed before we start building real pages.
</teammate-message>

input.content: Heydon -- all three priority issues are done and committed. I addressed them in commit `028bba1` and sent you a detailed response earlier. Quick recap: 1. **Skip link focus reveal**: New `.skip-link` class in the utilities layer. Hidden by default with the clip technique, reveals on `:focus` as a fixed-position element at top-left with shadow, z-index, and token-based styling. The base template should use `class="skip-link"` (not `class="visually-hidden"`) on the skip-to-content link. 2. **Motion-safe tokens**: Transition durations default to `0s` in `:root`, activated only inside `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference)`. Motion-safe by default, no developer discipline required. 3. **`--color-fg-muted` contrast**: Kept at Steve's gray-500 spec (~4.6:1, passes AA) with expanded documentation restricting usage to secondary/supporting text only. For the base template integration, here's what needs to happen: - `` in `` - `` for the CSS Grid layout - `Skip to main content` as the first child of `` - HTMX script tag before `` All committed and ready for the base template task.
input.summary: All 3 priority fixes already committed, base template guidance

content.text: Confirmed to Heydon that all three priority a11y fixes are committed and provided the exact integration points for the base template. Standing by for task consensus.
